challenges.title: Fix Low Contrast Text
challenges.description: Given a webpage with light gray text (#bbb) on white background, identify and fix the contrast issue to meet WCAG AA.
challenges.starterCode:
This text is hard to read because of poor contrast. It fails WCAG AA requirements.

Please fix the color to make it readable.
challenges.hint: Use the contrast ratio formula or an online checker. You need at least 4.5:1.
challenges.solution:
This text now meets WCAG AA requirements with a 4.5:1 contrast ratio.

This text meets WCAG AAA requirements with a 7:1 contrast ratio.

challenges.title: Accessible Button with Hover States
challenges.description: Create a button component that maintains WCAG AA contrast in all states: default, hover, focus, and disabled.
challenges.hint: Use CSS custom properties for the color palette. Check each state's contrast ratio.

challenges.title: Build a JavaScript Contrast Validator
challenges.description: Create a browser-based tool that accepts two hex colors, calculates their contrast ratio, and displays WCAG compliance (AA/AAA pass/fail for normal and large text).
challenges.hint: Implement the full luminance formula with gamma correction. Use Math.pow for the sRGB linearization.
